headline: P&L exposure: ₹206.2 Cr (engine estimate) direct profit impact (from article + engine estimate)
what_matters: Potential for 0.05x P/E compression (engine estimate) as market reprices risk; ₹192.7 Cr direct revenue at risk (engine estimate) with further ₹13.5 Cr workforce impact (engine estimate).
Profit slump may lead to a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital (engine estimate), with possible fund outflows from ESG-sensitive investors if disclosure gaps persist.
Triggers BRSR and GRI:201/207 scrutiny; SEBI may review disclosure completeness, with risk of trading restrictions if gaps persist.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹206.2 Cr (engine estimate) direct profit impact (from article + engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹192.7 Cr direct (engine estimate) + ₹13.5 Cr workforce impact (engine estimate)
